items.title: Tech Spending Is Still Strong. There’s 1 Big Winner and Plenty of Losers.
items.description: This year’s growth in IT spending could reach its fastest pace since the pandemic. Why Microsoft is the big winner.

items.title: Modern Wealth Management: A Tech Stack Built for M&A
items.description: Mike Capelle, co-CEO and co-founder of Modern Wealth, discusses how the firm is building a flexible technology stack that accommodates new firms, but also supports growth.

items.title: Goldman Sachs Assumes Coverage of Salesforce (CRM) Stock
items.description: Salesforce, Inc. (NYSE:CRM) is one of the Best Fundamental Stocks to Buy According to Analysts. On January 12, Goldman Sachs analyst Gabriela Borges assumed coverage of the company’s stock with a “Buy” rating and a price objective of $330. Notably, the firm assumed coverage of 12 stocks in the broader software sector. Furthermore, the firm […]

items.title: HSBC Says These 2 AI Stocks Are Likely to Be Earnings Winners. Should You Buy Them Now?
items.description: Beaten-down large-cap stocks such as Salesforce and Oracle have significant upside potential given their estimated growth rates.

items.title: The Worries Deepen for Software Stocks
items.description: Investors are increasingly worried that AI-based coding tools could erase the edge for software providers like Salesforce and Workday.
